expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: modern grid hyperlink-style coverage separates contextual-link styling from ordinary element rendering
expectations.evidence: Result explicitly states the case focus in multiple places, e.g. in the Phase 4a objective: "explicitly covers the case focus: modern grid hyperlink-style coverage separates contextual-link styling from ordinary element rendering" and throughout section 3/4: "tests the separation between: 1) contextual-link styling, and 2) ordinary element rendering within modern grid."

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: The output is labeled and structured as Phase 4a and provides a "focused test coverage contract" consistent with phase4a: Title "Phase 4a (Advisory) QA Plan Output", includes "Primary phase under test: phase4a", and section "1) Phase 4a Objective (Checkpoint Contract)" plus a "Test Design Contract (Phase 4a)" and "Phase 4a Acceptance Criteria".
